narrative:
Cols 60-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 937 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
